scope: Public VPS follower-seed readback for retained project Radicle RID

commands.summary: Started fresh VPS follower Radicle node on 0.0.0.0:8776, cloned retained RID through a temporary bootstrap connection to the retained seed, verified HEAD, and seeded the RID with scope all.
nc -vz -w 5 187.77.19.162 8776 succeeded, then a fresh temporary Radicle profile connected to the VPS seed, cloned the retained RID, and verified HEAD.

actions_not_taken: retained maintainer key material was not copied to the VPS
no secret passphrase or Radicle key material was written to committed evidence
fresh reader temporary Radicle state was removed after verification
temporary SSH bootstrap bridge was stopped after the VPS follower cloned the RID
ubuntu-work retained maintainer seed was stopped after VPS bootstrap
no production/private personal keys were used
no paid infrastructure, wallet, spending, or direct outreach was introduced by this loop
no permanent durability, censorship-resistance, security, global replication, identity-trust, or production-readiness claim is made
no future default public-routing availability claim is made
no full Radicle compatibility claim is made
claim_boundary: This records one public direct-seed readback through a VPS follower seed: a fresh reader on ubuntu-work connected to openclaw at 187.77.19.162:8776, cloned the retained Radicle RID, and read back the expected commit. It is not a permanent durability, default public-routing, global replication, security, identity-trust, or production-readiness guarantee.
